debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G C : Graph α β
M M' : Set β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
hM' : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M'
hC : C.IsCycleGraph
hCG : C ≤ @Graph.IsMatching.restrict₂ α β G M M' hM hM'
⊢ Disjoint (C.edgeSet ∩ M) (C.edgeSet ∩ M')

failed_attempts:
rw [Set.disjoint_iff]
  rintro e ⟨⟨heC, heM⟩, ⟨-, heM'⟩⟩
  have : e ∈ M ∆ M' := by
    have := hCG.edge_subset heC
    rw [IsMatching.restrict₂] at this
    simp only [loopRemove_edgeSet, restrict_edgeSet, mem_inter_iff, mem_sep_iff] at this
    exact this.1.2
  exact (mem_symmDiff.1 this).elim (fun h ↦ h.2 heM') (fun h ↦ h.2 heM)

rw [Set.disjoint_left]
  rintro e ⟨heC, heM⟩ ⟨_, heM'⟩
  have : e ∈ M ∆ M' := by
    have := hCG.edge_subset heC
    rw [IsMatching.restrict₂] at this
    simp at this
    tauto
  rw [mem_symmDiff] at this
  tauto

rw [Set.disjoint_iff]
  rintro e ⟨heC, heM⟩ ⟨_, heM'⟩
  have he := hCG.edge_subset heC
  rw [IsMatching.restrict₂, loopRemove_edgeSet, restrict_edgeSet] at he
  exact (mem_symmDiff.1 he.1.2).elim (λ h ↦ h.2 heM') (λ h ↦ h.1 heM)

rintro e ⟨heC, heM⟩ ⟨-, heM'⟩
  have : e ∈ M ∆ M' := by
    have := hCG.edge_subset heC
    simp only [IsMatching.restrict₂] at this
    exact this.1.1
  exact (mem_symmDiff_iff.1 this).2 (iff_of_true heM heM')

rw [Set.disjoint_iff]
  rintro e ⟨⟨heC, heM⟩, ⟨_, heM'⟩⟩
  have he := (le_iff.mp hCG).2 heC
  rw [IsMatching.restrict₂] at he
  simp only [loopRemove_edgeSet, restrict_edgeSet, mem_inter_iff, mem_sep_iff] at he
  have : e ∈ M ∆ M' := by tauto
  rw [mem_symmDiff_iff] at this
  cases this <;> contradiction

  intro e ⟨heC, heM⟩ ⟨_, heM'⟩
  have : e ∈ M ∆ M'
  · have := hCG.edgeSubset heC
    simp [IsMatching.restrict₂] at this
    tauto
  rw [mem_symmDiff_iff] at this
  tauto

  intro e he he'
  have : e ∈ M ∆ M' := by
    have h := hCG.edge_subset he.1
    simp [IsMatching.restrict₂] at h
    exact h.1.2
  exact (Set.mem_symmDiff_iff.mp this).elim (fun h ↦ h.2 he'.2) (fun h ↦ h.2 he.2)

  refine Set.disjoint_of_subset_left ?_ (Set.disjoint_symmDiff_inter _ _)

  simp only [Graph.restrict, Graph.loopRemove] at he

intro e heM heM'

  unfold IsMatching.restrict₂ at h

  exact (mem_symmDiff_iff.mp h.1.2).elim (fun x ↦ x.2 heM'.2) (fun x ↦ x.2 heM.2)
